series_metadata.series_title: TENANT INVOICES-JAMES A RHODES STATE OFFICE TOWER
series_metadata.series_description: Tenant invoices for tenant work, antenna and garage rent. Shows date, invoice number, work order number, description and amount.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain in operating area during current fiscal year, plus 1 additional fiscal year. Retain in storage for 3 additional year, then destroy, provided this record has been audited and audit report has been released., Paper: Wastepaper
